title: Approve HumanResources Record (Human Resources)
acceptanceCriteria: Reviewer can perform "Approve HumanResources Record" only when business rules and validations for HumanResources are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
businessRules: required fields must be present before submission
status transitions must follow Draft -> Submitted -> Approved/Rejected -> Archived
only the owner or an admin may edit a record while in Draft
a rejected record requires a reason before the owner can resubmit

positiveTests: Approve HumanResources Record succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
negativeTests: Approve HumanResources Record is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
validationTests: Each business validation listed for Human Resources is independently exercised against Approve HumanResources Record.
permissionTests: Approve HumanResources Record is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
workflowTests: Full lifecycle test: create -> Approve HumanResources Record -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
regressionTests: Medium - secondary step, breaking this degrades but does not block the module
coverageRules: REQ-HUMANRESOURCES-05 must map to at least one test and one implementation file.
